title: Ghost vs Customer.io (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Ghost vs Customer.io: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Ghost and Customer.io comes down to your specific use case. Ghost is built for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses, while Customer.io targets product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

comparison_table.tool_a: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses
comparison_table.tool_b: Product And Growth Teams Sending Behaviour-Triggered Messages

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Ghost wins for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses, while Customer.io is stronger for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Ghost or Customer.io?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Customer.io to Ghost?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
